traditional.success_rate: 高風險 (易受架構轉變影響)

with_ai.success_rate: 高速成長 (AI 需求爆發)
with_ai.source: AI 算力與基礎設施市場

pain_points_en: Easily disrupted by underlying model providers
ai_solutions_zh: 垂直領域微調
AI Agent 自主執行

value_chain_stats.title_zh: Layer 4: 基礎大模型與開源 (Foundation Models)
ai_solutions_zh: MoE 架構
合成數據擴充

value_chain_stats.title_zh: Layer 3: 數據與 MLOps 平台 (Data & Platforms)
ai_solutions_zh: 自動化特徵工程
LLMOps 監控

value_chain_stats.title_zh: Layer 2: 雲端與算力基礎設施 (Cloud Infrastructure)
ai_solutions_zh: 液冷散熱技術
彈性 GPU 叢集調度

value_chain_stats.title_zh: Layer 1: AI 晶片、記憶體與網通組件 (AI Semiconductors)
value_chain_stats.title_en: Layer 1: AI Chips, Memory & Networking (AI Semiconductors)
ai_solutions_zh: HBM 記憶體與 2.5D/3D 封裝
CPO 矽光子網通傳輸

companies.name: NVIDIA
pain_points_zh: 通用運算架構能耗過高
ai_solutions_zh: Blackwell 架構 GPU 加速器
CUDA 軟體生態系護城河
companies.rating_reason_zh: 壟斷 AI 訓練市場

deep_dive.profile_zh: NVIDIA 是全球 AI 算力的絕對霸主。透過領先的 GPU 架構（Hopper, Blackwell）與難以超越的 CUDA 軟體生態系，主導了整個大模型訓練與推論市場。
deep_dive.profile_en: NVIDIA is the undisputed leader in global AI compute. Through its leading GPU architectures (Hopper, Blackwell) and an unmatched CUDA software ecosystem, it dominates the entire large model training and inference market.
deep_dive.risk_assessment_zh: 估值較高。需留意大型 CSP 自研晶片 (ASIC) 帶來的潛在侵蝕，以及地緣政治出口管制風險。
deep_dive.risk_assessment_en: Elevated valuation. Watch for potential erosion from large CSPs developing in-house ASICs, and geopolitical export control risks.
deep_dive.investment_strategy_zh: 核心持股（Core Holding）。AI 算力基礎設施無可取代的基石。
deep_dive.investment_strategy_en: Core Holding. The irreplaceable cornerstone of AI compute infrastructure.
deep_dive.financial_link_zh: 🔗 查看財務報表行情

companies.name: TSMC
companies.phase_label_zh: Layer 1: 先進製程 / 封裝
pain_points_zh: AI 晶片尺寸與散熱限制
pain_points_en: AI chip die size and thermal constraints
ai_solutions_zh: 3nm/2nm 先進製程
CoWoS 先進封裝突破頻寬限制
ai_solutions_en: CoWoS advanced packaging to break bandwidth limits
companies.rating_reason_zh: 幾乎囊括所有 AI 晶片代工
companies.rating_reason_en: Manufactures virtually all high-end AI chips

deep_dive.profile_zh: 台積電 (TSMC) 是全球最大的晶圓代工廠。幾乎所有高階 AI 晶片 (NVDA, AMD, Broadcom) 均仰賴其 5nm/3nm 先進製程與 CoWoS 封裝技術。
deep_dive.profile_en: TSMC is the world's largest contract chipmaker. Nearly all leading AI chips (NVDA, AMD, Broadcom) rely on its 5nm/3nm advanced process nodes and CoWoS packaging technology.
deep_dive.risk_assessment_zh: 地緣政治風險 (台灣海峽) 是最大的估值折價因素。此外需防範 Intel Foundry 或 Samsung 的技術追趕。
deep_dive.risk_assessment_en: Geopolitical risk (Taiwan Strait) is the largest valuation discount factor. Also watch for Intel Foundry or Samsung closing the technology gap.
deep_dive.investment_strategy_zh: 逢低買進（Buy on Dips）。AI 時代的「賣鏟子製造商」，具備極深技術護城河。
deep_dive.investment_strategy_en: Buy on Dips. The 'pick-and-shovel' play of the AI era, with an extremely deep technology moat.
deep_dive.financial_link_zh: 🔗 查看財務報表行情

companies.name: Broadcom
companies.phase_label_zh: Layer 1: 網通 / 雲端 ASIC
pain_points_zh: 叢集規模擴大導致網絡延遲與瓶頸
通用 GPU 成本過高
pain_points_en: Network latency and bottlenecks as cluster scale grows
ai_solutions_zh: Tomahawk / Jericho 網絡交換器
Google TPU 等客製化 ASIC 晶片
companies.rating_reason_zh: AI 網通與 ASIC 雙引擎

deep_dive.profile_zh: Broadcom 在 AI 網路基礎設施與客製化晶片 (ASIC) 分野居主導地位。幫助 Google、Meta 等超大型雲端供應商設計並量產專用 AI 加速器。
deep_dive.profile_en: Broadcom leads in AI network infrastructure and custom silicon (ASIC). It helps hyperscalers like Google and Meta design and mass-produce dedicated AI accelerators.
deep_dive.risk_assessment_zh: VMware 併購後的整合陣痛期，以及主要 CSP 客戶若轉向自研底層 IP 帶來的訂單流失風險。
deep_dive.risk_assessment_en: Post-VMware integration headwinds, and risk of key CSP customers developing their own underlying IP and reducing orders.
deep_dive.investment_strategy_zh: 長期持有。AI 從單點算力走向叢集算力，網通晶片不可或缺。
deep_dive.investment_strategy_en: Long-term hold. As AI scales from single-node to cluster compute, networking chips are indispensable.
deep_dive.financial_link_zh: 🔗 查看財務報表行情

companies.name: Qualcomm
pain_points_zh: 雲端推論成本過高且延遲長
資料隱私與離線可用性
pain_points_en: Cloud inference is costly and latency-heavy
Data privacy and offline availability requirements
ai_solutions_zh: Snapdragon X Elite 筆電處理器
手機端 NPU 支援百億參數大模型
companies.rating_reason_zh: AI PC 與 AI 手機換機潮
companies.rating_reason_en: AI PC and AI smartphone upgrade cycle

deep_dive.profile_zh: Qualcomm 正從傳統手機通訊晶片龍頭轉型為邊緣 AI (Edge AI) 領航者，透過整合高效能 NPU 賦能 AI PC 與下一代 AI 智慧型手機。
deep_dive.profile_en: Qualcomm is transforming from a traditional mobile comms chip leader into an Edge AI pioneer, enabling AI PCs and next-gen AI smartphones through its high-performance integrated NPU.

pipeline_milestones.milestone_zh: 支援更大參數端側模型

deep_dive.risk_assessment_zh: 智慧型手機市場飽和。Apple 自研基帶晶片的替代威脅，以及 ARM 架構授權訴訟爭端。
deep_dive.risk_assessment_en: Saturated smartphone market. Threat from Apple's in-house baseband chip development, and ongoing ARM architecture licensing disputes.
deep_dive.investment_strategy_zh: 景氣循環操作。受惠於終端 AI 殺手級應用的普及，估值相對較低。
deep_dive.investment_strategy_en: Cyclical play. Benefits from killer app adoption at the edge; relatively low valuation vs. AI peers.
deep_dive.financial_link_zh: 🔗 查看財務報表行情

companies.name: Marvell
companies.phase_label_zh: Layer 1: 矽光子 / 高速傳輸
pain_points_zh: AI 伺服器間資料傳輸瓶頸
pain_points_en: Data transfer bottleneck between AI servers
Copper interconnect bandwidth limits and power consumption
ai_solutions_zh: PAM4 DSP 光通訊晶片
矽光子 (Silicon Photonics) 及 DCI 互連
companies.rating_reason_zh: 光通訊與 ASIC 需求激增
companies.rating_reason_en: Surging demand for optical networking and ASICs

deep_dive.profile_zh: Marvell 是資料中心高速傳輸解決方案的核心玩家。隨著 AI 叢集規模變大，光通訊 (Optical Networking) 與 AEC 需求大增，成為 AI 基礎設施的二線領頭羊。
deep_dive.profile_en: Marvell is a key player in high-speed data center interconnect solutions. As AI clusters scale up, optical networking and AEC demand surges, positioning Marvell as a secondary AI infrastructure leader.

pipeline_milestones.milestone_zh: 隨 AI 叢集大量部署

deep_dive.risk_assessment_zh: 非 AI 業務 (傳統企業網路、電信、儲存) 復甦緩慢拖累集團整體獲利。估值溢價較高。
deep_dive.risk_assessment_en: Slow recovery in non-AI segments (legacy enterprise networking, telecom, storage) drags on overall profitability. Elevated valuation premium.
deep_dive.investment_strategy_zh: 動能投資。光通訊升級週期的純度高，是除了 Broadcom 外的最佳網通替代標的。
deep_dive.investment_strategy_en: Momentum play. High purity optical upgrade cycle; best networking alternative beyond Broadcom.
deep_dive.financial_link_zh: 🔗 查看財務報表行情

companies.name: Micron
pain_points_zh: Memory Wall：算力成長遠超越記憶體頻寬
pain_points_en: Memory Wall: compute growth far outpaces memory bandwidth
ai_solutions_zh: HBM3e (高頻寬記憶體) 量產
高容量 DDR5 伺服器模組

deep_dive.profile_zh: Micron 是美國最大的記憶體製造商。AI 帶動的 HBM (High Bandwidth Memory) 需求大幅消耗了 DRAM 總體產能，讓整體記憶體產業迎來超級循環強週期。
deep_dive.profile_en: Micron is America's largest memory manufacturer. AI-driven HBM demand has significantly absorbed total DRAM capacity, ushering in a super-cycle for the memory industry.
deep_dive.risk_assessment_zh: 典型的週期性產業 (Cyclical)。若消費性電子終端 (PC/手機) 需求疲軟，將拖累標準型 DRAM 價格，抵銷 HBM 貢獻。
deep_dive.risk_assessment_en: Classic cyclical industry. Weak consumer electronics (PC/phone) demand can depress standard DRAM prices, offsetting HBM gains.
deep_dive.investment_strategy_zh: 波段操作。趁 HBM 滲透率提升與供需緊缺的週期上行期持有。
deep_dive.investment_strategy_en: Swing trade. Hold during the upcycle as HBM penetration rises and supply remains tight.
deep_dive.financial_link_zh: 🔗 查看財務報表行情

companies.name: AMD
pain_points_zh: 市場急需 NVIDIA 的第二供應來源
軟體生態系 (ROCm) 較為弱勢
pain_points_en: Market urgently needs a second GPU supplier
Software ecosystem (ROCm) less mature than CUDA
ai_solutions_zh: MI300 / MI325X 系列 AI 晶片
EPYC 伺服器 CPU 霸主地位
companies.rating_reason_zh: 唯一具備 GPU+CPU 挑戰實力的對手
companies.rating_reason_en: Only credible challenger with both GPU+CPU capabilities

deep_dive.profile_zh: AMD 在 AI GPU 領域（Instinct MI300系列）急起直追，成為雲端大廠除了 NVDA 之外最重要的備胎與議價籌碼。同時在伺服器 CPU 持續奪取 Intel 市佔。
deep_dive.profile_en: AMD is rapidly closing the gap in AI GPUs (Instinct MI300 series), becoming the most important NVDA alternative and bargaining chip for cloud providers. It also continues to take server CPU share from Intel.
deep_dive.risk_assessment_zh: 軟體生態系（ROCm）的成熟度仍落後 CUDA，開發者轉移成本高。且面臨 NVIDIA 快速推出新產品線的強烈壓制。
deep_dive.risk_assessment_en: ROCm software ecosystem maturity still trails CUDA, with high developer switching costs. Faces strong suppression from NVIDIA's rapid product cadence.
deep_dive.investment_strategy_zh: 多頭佈局。市場絕對需要第二家 GPU 供應商，AMD 的容錯空間與潛在市佔增長率極大。
deep_dive.investment_strategy_en: Bull position. The market absolutely needs a second GPU supplier; AMD has large upside potential and room for market share gains.
deep_dive.financial_link_zh: 🔗 查看財務報表行情

news_feed.title_zh: NVIDIA Blackwell B200 訂單積壓達 360 萬顆，H100 租賃成本逆勢漲 40%
news_feed.title_en: NVIDIA Blackwell B200 Backlog Hits 3.6M Units, H100 Lease Costs Surge 40%
news_feed.summary_zh: 市場分析報告指出，Blackwell 系列供不應求至 2026 年中。受此影響，部分雲端加速器租賃商將四年前發布的 H100 租金調漲近四成，顯示算力需求仍處於極度飢渴狀態。
news_feed.summary_en: Market reports indicate Blackwell series is sold out through mid-2026. Consequently, some GPU cloud providers have raised H100 lease rates by nearly 40% despite being 4-year-old tech, highlighting extreme compute scarcity.

news_feed.title_zh: 台積電 2nm 正式進入量產里程碑，2026 年產能已全數售罄
news_feed.title_en: TSMC Hits 2nm Mass Production Milestone, 2026 Capacity Fully Sold Out
news_feed.summary_zh: 台積電 (TSMC) 確認 2nm 晶片已正式進入量產階段，領先競爭對手約三年。首批兩座工廠的 2026 年產能已由 Apple、NVIDIA 等大客戶搶訂一空。
news_feed.summary_en: TSMC confirmed its 2nm chips have officially entered mass production, maintaining a 3-year lead over competitors. 2026 capacity at its initial two 2nm plants is already fully booked by major clients like Apple and NVIDIA.

news_feed.title_zh: Broadcom 拿下 Meta 四代晶片設計合約，自研 AI 晶片布局達千億規模
news_feed.title_en: Broadcom Secures 4-Gen Chip Design Deal with Meta, $100B Custom AI Silicon Bet
news_feed.summary_zh: 博通 (Broadcom) 獲得 Meta 未來四代 AI ASIC 的設計訂單。此外報導指出其與 OpenAI、Google 的客製化運算代工布局已達千億美元規模，鞏固非 GPU 算力的領導地位。
news_feed.summary_en: Broadcom secured a four-generation AI ASIC design deal with Meta. Reports detail its broader $100B custom silicon strategy involving Google and OpenAI, cementing its lead in non-GPU compute silicon.

news_feed.title_zh: Micron 開始量產 HBM4 供應 NVIDIA Vera Rubin，但 TrendForce 警示供貨延遲
news_feed.title_en: Micron Starts HBM4 Mass Production for NVIDIA Vera Rubin; TrendForce Warns of Delay
news_feed.summary_zh: 美光 (Micron) 宣布為 NVIDIA 下一代 Vera Rubin 架構量產 HBM4 記憶體。然而 TrendForce 指出由於規格變更與 NVIDIA 策略調整，大規模交付可能推遲至 2026 年底。
news_feed.summary_en: Micron announced high-volume production of HBM4 for NVIDIA's next-gen Vera Rubin. However, TrendForce warns that spec upgrades and strategic adjustments may delay widespread deployment until late 2026.

news_feed.title_zh: CES 2026：Qualcomm 發表 Snapdragon X2 Plus，AMD 推進 AI Everywhere 願景
news_feed.title_en: CES 2026: Qualcomm Unveils Snapdragon X2 Plus; AMD Advances AI Everywhere Vision
news_feed.summary_zh: 在 CES 2026 展示中，高通發表 Snapdragon X2 Plus 強化 AI PC 效能。同時 AMD 分享其「AI Everywhere」願景，擴大 MI300/MI320 系列在企業端的生態系合作。
news_feed.summary_en: At CES 2026, Qualcomm unveiled the Snapdragon X2 Plus to boost AI PC performance. Simultaneously, AMD detailed its 'AI Everywhere' vision, expanding ecosystem partnerships for its MI300/MI320 series.

news_feed.title_zh: NVIDIA 發布次世代 Rubin GPU 架構
news_feed.title_en: NVIDIA Unveils Next-Gen Rubin GPU Architecture
news_feed.summary_zh: NVIDIA 執行長黃仁勳宣布 Rubin 架構將搭載次世代 HBM4 記憶體，並由台積電 3nm 家族生產，進一步鞏固 AI 算力優勢。
news_feed.summary_en: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang announced the Rubin architecture will feature next-gen HBM4 memory and be manufactured on TSMC's 3nm family, further cementing NVIDIA's AI compute advantage.

update_history.description: 手動更新 2026 年 4 月第一週 AI 半導體重磅動態 (NVIDIA B200 積壓、台積電 2nm 量產、博通 Meta 協議)。
update_history.reason: 算力需求與技術領先地位顯著變動

update_history.description: 成功同步 NVDA, TSMC, AVGO 等七大企業的最新股價與 2026 預估 EPS。
update_history.reason: API 擷取資料完整無遺漏
